meaning: adj.中间的,临时的,间歇的n.中间时期,过渡时期,暂定
examples: The power-balance has evened out in the interim government.
She was sworn in as head of an interim government in March.
The vice-president took power in the interim period before the election.
Mr Khatami's support for the Afghan interim government is important for establishing peace and stability in Afghanistan.
Each 3-year update will be a full point release, with interim releases labeled 2.1, 2.2, etc.
